faq.question: How does the Spanish points licence work?
faq.answer: Drivers start with 12 points (8 for new drivers). Serious offences deduct points; reaching zero means licence suspension. Points can be recovered through safe driving courses.
faq.answer_de: Fahrer starten mit 12 Punkten (8 für Fahranfänger). Schwere Verstöße ziehen Punkte ab; bei null droht Entzug. Punkte können durch Kurse zurückgewonnen werden.

faq.question: Can I get a discount on Spanish traffic fines?
faq.question_de: Gibt es Rabatt auf spanische Bußgelder?
faq.answer: Yes. Pay within 20 calendar days of notification for a 50% reduction on the fine amount. Points are deducted regardless of payment timing.
faq.answer_de: Ja. Zahlung innerhalb 20 Tagen nach Zustellung bringt 50 % Ermäßigung auf den Betrag. Punkte werden unabhängig vom Zahlungszeitpunkt abgezogen.

faq.question: What is the fine for phone use while driving in Spain?
faq.question_de: Welches Bußgeld für Handy am Steuer in Spanien?
faq.answer: Using a handheld phone is a grave offence: €200 fine and 6 penalty points. Holding the phone counts—even at traffic lights.
faq.answer_de: Handy am Steuer ist schwerer Verstoß: €200 Bußgeld und 6 Punkte. Handy in der Hand zählt—auch an Ampeln.

faq.question: What are Spain's drink-drive limits?
faq.answer: 0.05% BAC for general drivers; 0.03% for novice drivers (first 2 years) and professionals. 0.05–0.08 g/L: €500 + 4 points. Above 0.12 g/L is a criminal offence. Refusing a breath test is treated as the highest category.
faq.answer_de: 0,05 % BAC allgemein; 0,03 % für Fahranfänger (2 Jahre) und Berufsfahrer. 0,05–0,08 g/l: €500 + 4 Punkte. Über 0,12 g/l Straftat. Atemtest-Verweigerung wie höchste Kategorie.

faq.question: Which Spanish motorways have tolls?
faq.answer: Autopistas (AP) are often toll roads; Autovías (A) are usually free. Electronic tolls (telepeaje) operate without barriers on some routes—ensure your rental has a Via-T device or register the plate.
faq.answer_de: Autopistas (AP) oft mautpflichtig; Autovías (A) meist frei. Elektronische Maut ohne Schranken—Mietwagen braucht Via-T oder Kennzeichenregistrierung.

faq.question: What is Madrid Central / low-emission zone?
faq.answer: Madrid and other cities operate ZBE (zonas de bajas emisiones). Non-compliant vehicles face fines. Register foreign plates where required before entering.
faq.answer_de: Madrid und andere Städte haben ZBE (Umweltzonen). Nicht konforme Fahrzeuge werden geahndet. Ausländische Kennzeichen ggf. vorher registrieren.

faq.question: Do I need a V16 warning beacon in Spain?
faq.question_de: Brauche ich in Spanien eine V16-Warnleuchte?
faq.answer: Since 2026 the V16 connected geolocated beacon replaces triangles on many roads. Using only triangles where V16 is required can be fined. Check DGT updates before travel.
faq.answer_de: Seit 2026 ersetzt die V16-Warnleuchte mit GPS an vielen Strecken die Warndreiecke. Nur Dreieck wo V16 Pflicht ist, kann geahndet werden. DGT-Updates vor Reise prüfen.

faq.question: Do I need an IDP to drive in Spain?
faq.question_de: Brauche ich in Spanien einen IDP?
faq.answer: EU/EEA licences are accepted. Non-EU licences may require an International Driving Permit depending on origin; rental companies often require one. Carry passport and licence at all times.
faq.answer_de: EU/EWR-Führerscheine werden akzeptiert. Nicht-EU-Führerscheine können IDP erfordern; Mietwagenfirmen verlangen oft einen. Reisepass und Führerschein immer mitführen.

source_entries.title: Traffic fines — what to do
source_entries.notes: 50% discount if paid within 20 days of notification.

summary: Spain has excellent highways. Speed limits are strictly enforced by helicopters and drones. Be careful with parking zones in cities. Warning: Driving flip-flops or shirtless can be fined.
common_traps: Items on back shelf blocking view.

speed_limits.notes: Urban limit often 30 km/h on single-lane one-way streets. No buffer on speed limits.

alcohol_limit.notes: 0.03% for novice drivers (<2 years) and professionals.

rules.child_seat_rules: Children <135cm must be in rear seats with approved system.
rules.phone_usage_rules: Handling phone is a serious offense (€200+). Using navigation while moving is banned.
rules.priority_rules: Give way to right. Roundabouts: Outside lane has priority to exit.

tolls.notes: Many 'Autopistas' (AP) are tolls. 'Autovias' (A) are generally free.

rules.parking_rules: Blue lines (Zona Azul) = Pay. Green lines = Residents usually. Yellow zig-zag = Tow away zone.
rules.winter_rules: Chains used in mountain areas when signed.

rental_and_idp_notes: IDP highly recommended for non-EU. Credit card mandatory for rentals.

regional_variations.notes: ZBE low-emission zone. Madrid Central restricts non-resident access.

highlights.title: ZBE Madrid
highlights.description: Register your vehicle category before driving into the low-emission zone.
highlights.description_de: Fahrzeugkategorie vor Einfahrt in die Umweltzone registrieren.

regional_variations.notes: ZBE covers most of the city. Foreign vehicles must register for access.

highlights.title: Barcelona ZBE
highlights.description: Check DGT and Ajuntament de Barcelona rules for foreign-plate registration.
highlights.description_de: DGT- und Stadtregeln für ausländische Kennzeichen prüfen.

summaries.title: Speeding
summaries.summary: DGT uses fixed cameras, helicopters, and mobile units. No official tolerance buffer on limits.
summaries.summary_de: DGT setzt feste Kameras, Helikopter und mobile Kontrollen ein. Kein offizieller Toleranzpuffer.
summaries.maxConsequence: Criminal offence above +50 km/h; licence suspension

summaries.title: Alcohol
summaries.summary: Strict limits; refusing breath test equals highest BAC category.
summaries.summary_de: Strenge Grenzen; Atemtest-Verweigerung wie höchste BAC-Kategorie.

categories.title: Speeding
categories.description: Grave (grave) and very grave (muy grave) categories. 50% discount if paid within 20 days. Source: DGT.
categories.description_de: Kategorien grave und muy grave. 50 % Ermäßigung bei Zahlung innerhalb 20 Tagen. Quelle: DGT.

rows.description_de: Handy in der Hand am Steuer
